description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: - Third-level headings are used within the Proposal Details section to describe individual input executive actions. Each action is presented under its own third-level heading, making it easy to identify and review.

- Fourth-level headings are used to describe specific derived actions within an input action. These headings provide additional context or detail necessary for understanding the implications of the input action, such as actions triggered by
an
a
Agent
Prime
spell or changes to market parameters.
This structured approach ensures that the document is both easy to navigate and comprehensive.

- Third-level headings are used within the Proposal Details section to describe individual input executive actions. Each action is presented under its own third-level heading, making it easy to identify and review.

- Fourth-level headings are used to describe specific derived actions within an input action. These headings provide additional context or detail necessary for understanding the implications of the input action, such as actions triggered by
a
an
Prime
Agent
spell or changes to market parameters.
This structured approach ensures that the document is both easy to navigate and comprehensive.
- First-level heading is used for the title of the document.
- Second-level headings are used for the four major sections of the Executive Document: Executive Summary, Proposal Details, Review, and Resources.

- Third-level headings are used within the Proposal Details section to describe individual input executive actions. Each action is presented under its own third-level heading, making it easy to identify and review.

- Fourth-level headings are used to describe specific derived actions within an input action. These headings provide additional context or detail necessary for understanding the implications of the input action, such as actions triggered by an Agent spell or changes to market parameters.
description: @blimpa @Coolcatcatio This PR updates all lists within the Atlas to follow the markdown specification. It also adds a markdownlint config file to start the process of fixing formatting across editors.

diff: - First-level heading is used for the title of the document.
- Second-level headings are used for the four major sections of the Executive Document:
Executive Summary,
Proposal Details,
Review, and
Resources.
- Third-level headings are used within the
Proposal Details
section to describe individual input executive actions. Each action is presented under its own third-level heading, making it easy to identify and review.

- Fourth-level headings are used to describe specific derived actions within an input action. These headings provide additional context or detail necessary for understanding the implications of the input action, such as actions triggered by an Agent spell or changes to market parameters.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
